name: rush-plugin
description: Rush 平台 Claude Code 插件集合 — 覆盖 skill 发现发布、项目创建交接等全流程能力。

plugins.name: rush-skills
plugins.description: Discover, install, and publish Rush skills through reskill. Search the Rush registry with natural-language intent and publish new skills with sensible defaults.

plugins.name: rush-skills-cowork
plugins.description: Discover, install, and publish Rush skills through reskill for Claude Cowork 3P. Defaults installs to claude-cowork-3p and app-managed skill roots.

plugins.name: rush-ai
plugins.description: Rush 平台全流程交互 — 创建新项目、管理已有任务、发现专业 agent 和 MCP 资源。封装 rush-ai CLI，在合适场景自动激活。
